Extract & Structure Data from Your Documents at Scale

AnyGrid uses AI to extract, structure, and analyze data from your business documents—so you can focus on decisions, not data entry. Upload your documents, ask questions in natural language, and get structured answers in seconds.

Get early access   → Schedule demo
Save Time ━ Reduce hours of manual document review to seconds.
Structured Insights ━ Convert unstructured documents into organized, exportable spreadsheets.
Instant Answers ━ Ask questions in natural language and get structured responses.

Turn Hours of Document Review into Seconds

If you could kick the person in the pants responsible for most of your trouble, you wouldn't sit for a month

Features.

AI-Powered Extraction

Scan, interpret, and structure data from PDFs, invoices, contracts, and more.

Reusable Elements

Define prompts and expected outputs to use across multiple workbooks.

Natural Language Queries

Ask questions about your docs in natural language and get structured responses instantly.

Create Unlimited Workbooks

Organize extracted data into customizable workbooks.

Customizable Columns & Fields

Add or remove columns dynamically to fit your needs.

Pre-Built & Custom Templates

Browse sample workbooks or create your own.

Workbook Builder

Create grids with columns and rows of documents, enabling seamless organization and data extraction. Whether managing invoices, contracts, or reports, you can customize each workbook to fit your needs.

Create your own columns in seconds

Extract and structure data with natural language from of any document

Organize at scale

Use AnyGrid to analyze, summarize and compare hundreds of documents in seconds.

Instant answers

Ask questions in natural language and get structured responses.

Use Cases

AnyGrid can help across every department.

Invoice Processing

Automatically extract totals, due dates, and line items from invoices to streamline accounting and payments.

Resume Screening

Identify key skills, experience, and qualifications from candidate resumes to speed up hiring decisions.

Contract Analysis

Extract key terms, renewal dates, and obligations from legal agreements to ensure compliance.

Expense Report Audits

Scan receipts and expense reports to verify compliance and detect anomalies.

Medical Records Organization

Structure patient data from medical records for better analysis and reporting.

Real Estate Document Management

Organize lease agreements, property details, and transaction data for easy access and insights.
